reviews.comment:
rápida atención, baños en buenas condiciones, pero los precios son demasiado altos en alimentos!!!! La higiene exterior es baja, impresionante la cantidad de moscas!!

(Translated by Google)
Fast service, restrooms in good condition, but food prices are way too high! Exterior hygiene is poor; the number of flies is astounding!

reviews.comment:
Café y las facturas de muy mala calidad. El personal de la paya 10 puntos, pero la cafetería deja bastante que desear.

(Translated by Google)
The coffee and pastries were of very poor quality. The staff at the beach were excellent, but the café itself left much to be desired.

reviews.comment:
El playero que estaba ayer alrededor de las 13 hs un maleducado, la atención pésima.

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendant who was there yesterday around 1 pm was rude, the service was terrible.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURld2MyMmxnRRAB

reviews.comment:
El playero un mal educado. Pésima atención recibida 10 de octubre 2022 13.45 hs aprox por parte de él. No volvería, y de no haber estado tan agotados de tantas horas de viaje, hubiese hecho una queja formal.

(Translated by Google)
The attendant was rude. The service I received from him on October 10, 2022, at approximately 1:45 PM, was terrible. I wouldn't return, and if we hadn't been so exhausted from our long trip, I would have filed a formal complaint.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURld2ZuZGlnRRAB
